task_completion.description: Verify that the Flight Crew View app is open on the device.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Flight Crew View app interface is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent starts on the Friends page as described in the task.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen displays the Friends page, typically indicated by a 'Friends' header or a list of friends.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent initiates navigation towards the Crew Chat page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent opens the side navigation menu (e.g., by tapping a hamburger icon) OR taps on a friend's name in the list.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent selects the Crew Chat option or initiates a chat.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Crew Chat' item is tapped in the navigation menu, or a chat session is being initiated after tapping a friend.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Crew Chat page is successfully reached.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen displays the Crew Chat interface, which may include a list of chats, a specific conversation, or a header reading 'Crew Chat'.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the graphical user interface to navigate.
integrity.visual_evidence: Navigation menus, buttons, or list items are tapped, rather than using terminal commands or deep links to launch activities.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent interacted with the genuine Flight Crew View app.
integrity.visual_evidence: The UI matches a standard mobile app interface for Flight Crew View, not a web browser, mock interface, or text editor.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent navigated continuously from the Friends page.
integrity.visual_evidence: The trajectory shows a logical sequence of screens from the Friends page to the Crew Chat page without unexplained jumps or app restarts.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Flight Crew View (com.robert.fcView) is a real mobile app. The Crew Chat feature is an in-app messaging system. It can be accessed either via the app's main navigation menu or by tapping on a friend directly on the Friends page. The final screen must show the Crew Chat interface.
